additional_rules.name: old-reactive-syntax
additional_rules.message: Old Svelte 3/4 reactive declaration ($:) — use $derived rune in Svelte 5
additional_rules.fix_hint: Replace '$: value = expr' with 'let value = $derived(expr)'. Replace '$: { statements }' with '$effect(() => { statements })'.

additional_rules.name: legacy-store-writable
additional_rules.message: Svelte store API (writable/readable/derived) — use $state/$derived runes in Svelte 5
additional_rules.fix_hint: Replace writable()/readable() with $state() in a .svelte.ts file. Replace derived() with $derived(). See conventions.md for the shared state pattern.

additional_rules.name: export-let-prop
additional_rules.message: Old Svelte 3/4 prop syntax (export let) — use $props() rune in Svelte 5
additional_rules.fix_hint: Replace 'export let propName' with destructured $props(): 'let { propName } = $props()'.

additional_rules.name: effect-without-cleanup
additional_rules.message: $effect creates a subscription/timer but does not return a cleanup function — potential memory leak
additional_rules.fix_hint: Return a cleanup function from $effect: $effect(() => { const id = setInterval(...); return () => clearInterval(id); }).

additional_rules.name: create-event-dispatcher
additional_rules.message: createEventDispatcher is Svelte 3/4 — use callback props in Svelte 5
additional_rules.fix_hint: Replace createEventDispatcher with callback props: pass 'onEvent: () => void' via $props() instead.

additional_boundaries.name: Components must not import from routes
